summary: Iteration 55 - Profile Page Redesign (Human Action Record) testing complete. All 15 backend API tests PASSED. All frontend UI tests PASSED. Dark documentary theme with field_contribution, share modal, and RTL Hebrew layout verified.
critical_code_review_comments: ProfilePage.js correctly implements dark theme with bg-[#0a0a12] and dir='rtl'
field_contribution object properly returned from /api/profile/{user_id}/record with total_actions, days_active, field_percentage
Share modal using html-to-image (toPng) for card generation with quality=0.95 and pixelRatio=2
Opposition axes showing 3 tension arcs with glowing position dots via boxShadow
Influence chain displaying invited_by_alias, invitees list, active_invitees, and invite_credits
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
seed_data_creation: Used existing test users from iteration 54
context_for_next_testing_agent: Profile page redesign complete. Key features: (1) Dark theme #0a0a12 background throughout. (2) Stats strip shows 4 metrics: impact, actions, streak, field_contribution%. (3) field_contribution calculated as user's actions / total field actions * 100. (4) Opposition axes show 3 tension arcs (chaos_order, ego_collective, exploration_stability) with glowing position dots. (5) Influence chain shows invited_by_alias, invitees list, active_invitees count, invite_credits. (6) Share modal with downloadable card via html-to-image. (7) All content in RTL Hebrew layout.

backend_api_tests.test_profile_record_identity_section: PASS - alias, country, member_since, dominant_direction, dominant_direction_he
backend_api_tests.test_profile_record_action_record: PASS - actions with meanings (personal_he, social_he, value_he, system_he)

frontend_ui_tests.hero_section_identity: PASS - alias, location, date, direction badge
frontend_ui_tests.hero_invited_by_display: PASS - 'הוזמן על ידי Sentinel' shown for invitee
frontend_ui_tests.stats_strip_4_metrics: PASS - impact (15), actions (4), streak (1 ימים), field_contribution (21.1%)
frontend_ui_tests.opposition_axes_3_arcs: PASS - chaos_order, ego_collective, exploration_stability with glowing dots
frontend_ui_tests.influence_chain_section: PASS - 'הביא לשדה 1 אנשים', '1 פעילים', '1 נקודות ערך'
frontend_ui_tests.action_record_expandable: PASS - cards expand to show meanings
frontend_ui_tests.share_card_content: PASS - stats, axes, influence data, 'Human Action Record' branding

api_endpoints_tested: GET /api/profile/{user_id}/record - returns identity, action_record, opposition_axes, value_growth, direction_distribution, field_contribution, influence_chain
